97 _39BG GRMG_GOAL_CD (39Bg) Self-Care: Grooming: Goal CHAR 2 A score indicating the desired goal for the patient to achieve for grooming at discharge. Grooming includes oral care, hair grooming (combing or brushing hair), washing the hands, face, and either shaving the face or applying make-up. If the patient neither
